name: Papilon Savunma-Guvenlik Sistemleri Bilisim Muhendislik Hizmetleri Ithalat Ihracat Sanayi ve Ticaret
summary: Papilon Savunma-Guvenlik Sistemleri Bilisim Muhendislik Hizmetleri Ithalat Ihracat Sanayi ve Ticaret provides security, defense, and IT engineering services. The company offers solutions for biometric identification, border security, and critical infrastructure protection. Papilon is based in Turkey.
